title: T-051 — HACCP CRUD APIs (plans + CCPs + monitoring tick) — V-QA-HACCP/CCP
prompt:
# T-051 — HACCP CRUD APIs

PRD: §11.5 V-QA-HACCP-001..003 + V-QA-CCP-001..005, §7.1 09-e-02, §5.3 signature for biological/allergen CCP
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for HACCP lifecycle: createHaccpPlan, activatePlan (e-sign), addCcp (V-QA-HACCP-002 limits validation), monitorCcpTick (records monitoring + within_limits + conditional e-sign for biological/allergen hazards). Reuse ESignBlock (T-039).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/haccp/actions.ts — 4 Server Actions.
2. createHaccpPlan: insert haccp_plans status='draft', V-QA-HACCP-001 requires at least 1 CCP before activate.
3. activatePlan: status='draft'→'active', e-sign via T-039 ESignBlock, role=quality_lead, meaning='approved'; emits quality.haccp.plan.activated outbox.
4. addCcp: validates V-QA-HACCP-002 (critical_limit_min OR critical_limit_max NOT NULL) + V-QA-HACCP-003 (monitoring_frequency parseable: regex/pgRegex against {'(\\d+)(min|h|d)','batch','continuous','every (\\d+) batches'}); sets active=true.
5. monitorCcpTick: inserts haccp_monitoring_records; within_limits auto-computed by DB GENERATED column; V-QA-CCP-002 (measured_value required if monitoring_method!='observational') server-validated; V-QA-CCP-005 (signature required for hazard_type IN ('biological','allergen')) enforces ESignBlock call before insert; V-QA-CCP-004 (post-deviation requires corrective_action before next tick on same CCP) server-checks last_reading.within_limits=false → next tick must include corrective_action.
6. Permissions reserved (packages/rbac): quality.haccp.create, quality.haccp.activate, quality.ccp.create, quality.ccp.monitor, quality.ccp.read.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/haccp/actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/haccp/__tests__/actions.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/haccp/zodSchemas.ts [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a draft haccp_plan with 0 CCPs, when activatePlan is called, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-HACCP-001'
2. Given addCcp with monitoring_frequency='every 30 batches', when called, then it passes (regex match); with 'whenever' it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-HACCP-003'
3. Given monitorCcpTick on a CCP with hazard_type='biological' without providing PIN/signature_hash, when called, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-CCP-005'; with valid sign via T-039 then a haccp_monitoring_records row is inserted with signature_hash and within_limits server-computed
4. Given the last monitoring_record for a CCP had within_limits=false AND no corrective_action recorded, when monitorCcpTick(nextValue) is called without corrective_action, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-CCP-004'

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: haccp/__tests__/actions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test haccp/actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow client-side within_limits — DB GENERATED column is authoritative (T-047)
- Do not bypass ESignBlock for biological/allergen CCPs (V-QA-CCP-005 + translation-notes §M-08)
- Do not skip V-QA-CCP-004 prior-deviation gate (audit-critical)
- Do not hardcode monitoring_frequency parseable strings — keep regex centralized in zodSchemas.ts

pipeline_inputs.description: 4 HACCP Server Actions (createPlan/activate/addCcp/monitorCcpTick) enforcing V-QA-HACCP-001..003 + V-QA-CCP-001..005 + conditional e-sign for biological/allergen hazards (T-039).
pipeline_inputs.details: apps/web/src/server/quality/haccp/actions.ts hosts the 4 Server Actions. createHaccpPlan: insert status='draft'. activatePlan: 'draft'→'active' via T-039 ESignBlock, role=quality_lead; emits quality.haccp.plan.activated. addCcp: V-QA-HACCP-002 + V-QA-HACCP-003 (regex monitoring_frequency parseable: (\\d+)(min|h|d) | batch | continuous | every (\\d+) batches). monitorCcpTick: insert haccp_monitoring_records (within_limits is DB GENERATED via T-047); V-QA-CCP-002, V-QA-CCP-004 prior-deviation gate (last reading within_limits=false AND no corrective_action → next must include corrective_action), V-QA-CCP-005 biological/allergen signature via T-039 ESignBlock. Permissions reserved (packages/rbac): quality.haccp.create, quality.haccp.activate, quality.ccp.create, quality.ccp.monitor, quality.ccp.read. PRD anchors verified: §11.5 validations; §7.1 09-e-02 scope; §5.3 signature evidence pattern.
out_of_scope: Do not register DSL rule ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 here (T-052)
Do not implement haccp_deviations table or workflows (P2 Epic 8I)
acceptance_criteria: Given a draft haccp_plan with 0 CCPs, when activatePlan is called, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-HACCP-001'
Given addCcp with monitoring_frequency='every 30 batches', when called, then it passes regex; with 'whenever' it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-HACCP-003'

Given monitorCcpTick on hazard_type='biological' without signature, when called, then 422 error.code='V-QA-CCP-005'; with valid sign via T-039, the record is inserted with signature_hash and within_limits is server-computed
Given the last monitoring record for a CCP had within_limits=false AND no corrective_action, when monitorCcpTick is called without corrective_action, then 422 error.code='V-QA-CCP-004'

risk_red_lines: Do not allow client to set within_limits — DB GENERATED authoritative (T-047)
Do not bypass ESignBlock for biological/allergen CCPs (V-QA-CCP-005 + translation-notes §M-08)
Do not skip V-QA-CCP-004 prior-deviation gate
Centralize monitoring_frequency regex in zodSchemas.ts (no hardcoded re patterns sprinkled across UI)
